ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Guard, Forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class standing of the player (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Contract expiration date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team for the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home/away) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose stats are recorded */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which performance was recorded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in coaching */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the schedule entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in the schedule */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled game */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the scheduled game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "tournament" TEXT /* Tournament the game is part of */,
  "broadcast_channel" TEXT /* Broadcast channel for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedule_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_roster" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the roster entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player in the roster */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the player was added to the roster */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player in the roster */,
  "position_number" INTEGER /* Position number within the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_roster_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player with the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., Sprain, Fracture) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the injury was reported */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected return date for the player */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treating physician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the training session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the training session takes place */,
  "focus" TEXT /* Focus of the training session (e.g., Conditioning, Skills) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach leading the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the availability record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., Available, Injured, Unavailable) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for unavailability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_availability_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user authentication */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Account status (Active/Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee (player or coach) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid in the payroll */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., Salary, Bonus) */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payment */,
  "tax_withheld" REAL /* Amount of tax withheld */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)
